stem:
P(t) = 320(1.05)(8/3)t

The function P models the population, in thousands, of a certain city t years after 2010. According to the model, the population is predicted to increase by 5% every n months. What is the value of n?
rationale: Choice A is correct. The population multiplies by 1.05 each time the exponent increases by 1. The exponent (8/3)t increases by 1 when t increases by 3/8 of a year. In months, that is (3/8)(12) = 4.5 months.
